parameters.jsCode:
// Build alert for zero-conversion campaigns const { zeroConversionCampaigns, count, totalWastedSpend } = $json; const campaignRows = zeroConversionCampaigns.map(c => ` ${c.campaign_name} $${c.total_cost.toFixed(2)} 0 ${c.days} day${c.days > 1 ? 's' : ''} ` ).join(''); const html = `

Zero-Conversion Campaign Alert

${count} campaign${count > 1 ? 's have' : ' has'} produced zero conversions in the last 48 hours while spending $${totalWastedSpend.toFixed(2)}.

${campaignRows}
Campaign 48h Spend Conversions Data Points

Note: Auto-pause via Google Ads API is not yet configured. Manual review recommended.

`; return [{ json: { alert_type: 'no_conversions_48h', alert_title: `${count} Campaign${count > 1 ? 's' : ''} With Zero Conversions (48h) — $${totalWastedSpend.toFixed(2)} Wasted`, alert_body: html, severity: 'critical', source_workflow: 'TG-112', metadata: { zeroConversionCampaigns, totalWastedSpend }, action_taken: 'alert_only' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ alert_type: 'no_conversions_48h', severity: 'critical', message: $('Build Conversion Alert').first().json.alert_title, details: { campaigns: $('Analyze Conversions').first().json.zeroConversionCampaigns, total_wasted: $('Analyze Conversions').first().json.totalWastedSpend }, action_taken: 'alert_only', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
